name: Sowrashtram
notes: Janya of Mayamalavagowla (15th melakarta); shadava-sampoorna raga (6 notes ascending, 7 descending); ārohana S R1 G3 M1 P N3 S, avarohana S N3 D1 P M1 G3 R1 S; evokes devotion and auspiciousness; traditionally used for mangalam compositions; associated with Tyagaraja's 'Ni Nama Roopamulaku'
